UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAHORGUE, MICHAEL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, GLENN WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 737 HYDE ST #505, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, GLENN WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 4/24/96 $2,614.00 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,189.00, LEASE FORFEITED
